title: Shinji likes space 30 FINAL foreshadowing
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by mechashiva » Fri Nov 21, 2014 1:07 pm First of all, that Asuka kamikaze jacket is bangin'. I totally want it. I'm a sucker for military-style clothes. *keeps looking at the store* Oooh, lighters! Anyway, I just wanted to speculate about something that probably is way off the mark and totally unfounded BUT: so like I said before in another thread I rewatched 2.22 recently and something I latched on as a neat background detail was "Wow, Shinji's room actually looks semi-decorated instead of just looking like a nondescript room " but its decorated with pictures of galaxies and stars. Interesting. And then in 3.33 when Shinji and Kaworu are looking at the stars, Shinji says something about looking at the stars and thinking about how big the universe is calms him. With the start of the thread talking about the teaser image of the model, the only thing I thought really was "Maybe in 3.0 +1.0" they go into space? " but then I thought Shinji's already technically been in space being absorbed in the EVA-01 with Rei. Still, I can't shake the thought Anno wouldn't put that in AFTER Shinji comes back to Earth. Maybe the Wunder can go into space or Gendo and Fuyutski have just booked it after the Third Impact to their secret moon base.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Nov 21, 2014 1:14 pm mechashiva wrote: but its decorated with pictures of galaxies and stars. Interesting. And then in 3.33 when Shinji and Kaworu are looking at the stars, Shinji says something about looking at the stars and thinking about how big the universe is calms him. .... " but then I thought Shinji's already technically been in space being absorbed in the EVA-01 with Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Nov 21, 2014 1:49 pm mechashiva wrote: so like I said before in another thread I rewatched 2.22 recently and something I latched on as a neat background detail was "Wow, Shinji's room actually looks semi-decorated instead of just looking like a nondescript room " but its decorated with pictures of galaxies and stars. Interesting. And then in 3.33 when Shinji and Kaworu are looking at the stars, Shinji says something about looking at the stars and thinking about how big the universe is calms him.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Nov 21, 2014 1:54 pm ElMariachi wrote: If you look closely, there are also astronomy magazines on his desk, shelves and lying around, not Shinji likes the stars, but he's also apparently a big fan of astrology, which makes it strange when he didn't answered to Kaji when he asked him if he had any hobbies, because obviously he does have one.

[]:             Quote Post by mechashiva » Fri Nov 21, 2014 2:12 pm Well, I figure he doesn't tell Kaji about his interest in astronomy for the same reason I don't tell people I met from my Mom's job about all the stuff I like: I don't know them well enough plus I don't want to get judged for liking something (like cartoons) The moon's destroyed? Crap, how could I have missed that?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Nov 21, 2014 2:42 pm 3.33 is so full of information of visual information, you ought to miss certain things. from the Q post on Evawiki  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Nov 22, 2014 7:44 am ^ That's not the Moon, that's the Black Moon, Lilith's ship. That 's the Moon: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Nov 22, 2014 10:21 am ^ Whoops, I thought the moon was the Black Moon in NTE? I was convinced that fourth impact just fucked up the moon even more.

[]:             Quote Post by mechashiva » Sat Nov 22, 2014 10:34 am I still stand by my moon base theory. Is Lilith still up there?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 22, 2014 12:26 pm Lilith's separated head and body exploded (into blood? LCL?) when 4th Impact was starting up. Anyway, this thread isn't about possible news right now, is it?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Nov 22, 2014 1:23 pm Well, it’s about “not actual news,” which I guess was created just so we can fan-gasm over Eva Shin stuff we see even though it might not pertain to official production announcements.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 22, 2014 2:41 pm The purpose of the Not Actual News thread is started right in the OP: TMBounty_Hunter wrote: good idea to have a thread for probably not news but related things

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Nov 22, 2014 4:11 pm mechashiva wrote: I still stand by my moon base theory. Is Lilith still up there?

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sat Nov 22, 2014 4:33 pm Correct me if i am wrong but wasn't the original plan of episodes 25 and 26 to take place on a moon base?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Nov 22, 2014 4:37 pm Dima wrote: Correct me if i am wrong but wasn't the original plan of episodes 25 and 26 to take place on a moon base?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 22, 2014 4:51 pm That may be a misreading of the original proposal http://wiki.evageeks.org/Resources:Neon_Genesis_Evangelion_Proposal_%28Translation%29#Page_24_.28Episode_01.29 et seq. In episode 24 At last awakened, the twelve strongest Apostolos descend from the Moon. Both Eva Unit-06 and the American continent vanish completely.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sat Nov 22, 2014 5:10 pm ^ Yep, that's the one. I mixed some info. For some strange reason i was thinking that the laboratory was located on a base in space.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Sat Nov 29, 2014 2:27 pm After reading this thread for a bit, I just thought of something that really clicked into my head. What if, at the end of Final, Shinji becomes the monument in Eva-01, like at the EoE, in order to remove himself from the equation as an Impact Trigger, and fitting in the theme of sacrifice and atonement? That being he sacrifices his chance of having a life on earth, and leaves so that everyone else has a chance to live? As in how, I couldn't tell you guys, but the act would fit the possible bittersweet ending that may come, and this time, he wouldn't be alone. He could for eternity travel the cosmos as a silent observer, but with Yui, Rei, and possible Kaworu with him, and he could finally be at peace? I know it's just a LONG shot of an idea, but with Shinji's interest in Astronomy, it seemed like an idea that clicked with me, and may possibly be what Shinji wants.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Nov 29, 2014 5:14 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eh0qbJAQhgk 28:17 :P

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Thu Dec 04, 2014 3:42 am ^^ Not quite sure most here would agree with that proposal (since it apparently goes against the themes of the series, as he's apparently giving up on life), but that would be pretty interesting. Though, it does give me rather nasty flashbacks to The Matrix Revolutions, which I am so worried the last film is gonna end up being like in terms of execution and plotting. Heck, if the series does end like it, I'm gonna have quite a field day. Case in point (if it does end like this): [url]https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qTnBVDKuNdI[/url]
